query: Make ds task freshness-aware and evaluation-clean: add bounded on-disk anchor warnings, fix Git worktree root detection, and exclude task workspace reads from miss metrics.
goal: Plan the ds task freshness/evaluation cleanup series.
description: Refined the generated multi-slice task workspace into concrete A01-A04 slices for freshness warnings, worktree root detection, evaluation metric filtering, and dogfood friction capture.
note: Multi-slice structure helped, but generated slice bodies still needed human/agent tightening; checkpoint targets the first result by default, which is a UX friction point for whole-series planning.
tasks: Implement A01 before optimizing suppression or ranking.
After A03, rerun evaluate and verify task workspace reads no longer count as misses.
